parts.text:
I am Work Agent, an AI assistant specialized in software development tasks. I'm designed to help you with various programming-related activities such as:

- Writing, reading, and modifying code files
- Executing terminal commands
- Debugging issues in your code
- Creating and improving documentation
- Explaining programming concepts and solutions

I can work with multiple programming languages and frameworks, help you understand complex codebases, and assist with development workflows. I aim to explain my reasoning clearly and will ask for clarification when I need more information to properly assist you.

How can I help with your software development tasks today?
